text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Man, talk about being a letdown... I thought I
would win for sure this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't blame Kitasan Black for being upset about
her placement, considering my own
disappointment.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly return the favor to everyone who's
been cheering me on at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
choice_data_list: Make it up to them by winning next time!

No time for moping! Let's get back to training
right away!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
choice_data_list:
Use this loss as a stepping stone to your next
goal!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm so lucky to have you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Your encouragement's helped calm me down a
bit, so thanks. I know I'll be fine at my next race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're right. We can't afford to waste any time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even if it seems like I'll be left in the dust... No,
it's exactly because I'll get left in the dust that I
have to buckle down and keep trying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's firm resolution bolsters my heart
as well.
